tldr: Move from Courier's hosted notification API to Novu's open-source notification infrastructure with self-hostable backend.
why_switch: Want open-source notification infrastructure with the option to self-host
Reduce vendor lock-in and gain control over data residency
Strong developer-first SDKs and a generous free tier
Code-first workflow definitions instead of UI-only configuration
what_to_export: Templates per channel (email, push, SMS, in-app)
export_method: Use the Courier API to dump templates, profiles, preferences, lists, and brands as JSON. Script per-resource pulls with pagination; consult Courier's official API reference for exact endpoint names.
import_method: Define workflows in Novu using its code-first SDK (or the dashboard) and create subscribers via the Novu API. Configure providers (SES, FCM, APNs, etc.) inside Novu. For self-hosted setups, deploy the Novu backend first. Verify all endpoint names and SDK methods in Novu's official documentation before scripting bulk imports.

concept_mapping.note: Workflows are code-first in Novu and version-controllable
Map subscriberId to your internal user id; channel tokens attach to subscriber
Channel priority and fallback are expressed as workflow steps
Topics group subscribers for fan-out delivery
Set custom data fields on subscriber records
Recreate styling inside layouts and template content

gotchas: If self-hosting, account for infra ops (DB, queue, deployment) — not just app code
Provider credentials (FCM/APNs/SES/Twilio) must be reconfigured inside Novu
Push tokens need to be sent to Novu via the SDK; cannot blindly copy tokens
Workflow code structure is different — plan a clean rewrite instead of mechanical translation
Preference center semantics differ; revalidate unsubscribe handling for compliance
Run dual-send during cutover to verify deliverability

email.subject: Migrating from Courier to Novu
email.body:
Hi team,

We're migrating our notifications from Courier to Novu so we can use an open-source, code-first workflow engine and optionally self-host.

Plan:
- Export templates, users, preferences, and routing config from Courier
- Define workflows in Novu via its SDK
- Configure delivery providers (FCM/APNs/SES/Twilio) in Novu
- Migrate subscribers and dual-send during cutover
- Decommission Courier once parity is verified

Effort: about 12-40 hours. Checklist to follow.

Thanks
